# TableSeatingPlannerIsolated

## Summary

The full planner application, assigned as the card's isolated format. It renders a zoomable, pannable canvas of tables and fixtures with drag-and-drop guest seating, marquee multi-select, copy/paste, resize/rotate, and undo/redo with keyboard shortcuts. Beyond the canvas it offers a floor-plan image underlay (upload plus AI analysis), an "arrange with AI" action that opens an AI Assistant room armed with the seat-arranger skill, print output for place cards or the seating chart, an invites view for invitation and poster content, and saving the current layout as a template snapshot. On first run it shows the SetupWizard. A linked theme (`cardInfo.theme`) is applied by the standard card theming pipeline, not by this component — every rule here reads the theme's semantic tokens (plus the planner's `--tsp-*` extras) through `var(--token, fallback)` chains, so an unthemed planner falls back to the package's Parisian look.

## Import

```js
import { TableSeatingPlannerIsolated } from '../components/tsp';
```

## Template Usage

Not typically invoked directly — the card definition assigns it as the isolated format in `table-seating-planner.gts`:

```js
TableSeatingPlanner.isolated = TableSeatingPlannerIsolated;
```
